mapper.select:
SELECT p.PRODUCT_ID, p.PRODUCT_CD, p.PRODUCT_NAME, p.BRAND_NAME, p.CATEGORY_ID, c.CATEGORY_NAME, TO_NUMBER(p.PRICE) AS PRICE, TO_NUMBER(p.SALE_PRICE) AS SALE_PRICE, NVL(os.STOCK_QTY, 0) AS STOCK_QTY, f.FILE_URL AS THUMBNAIL_URL, NVL(rv.AVG_RATING, 0) AS AVG_RATING, NVL(rv.REVIEW_COUNT, 0) AS REVIEW_COUNT FROM TB_PRODUCT p JOIN TB_PRODUCT_CATEGORY c ON c.CATEGORY_ID = p.CATEGORY_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PRODUCT_ID, SUM(STOCK_QTY) AS STOCK_QTY FROM TB_PRODUCT_OPTION GROUP BY PRODUCT_ID ) os ON os.PRODUCT_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TARGET_ID, ROUND(AVG(RATING), 1) AS AVG_RATING, COUNT(REVIEW_ID) AS REVIEW_COUNT FROM TB_REVIEW WHERE REVIEW_TYPE = 'PRODUCT' GROUP BY TARGET_ID ) rv ON rv.TARGET_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT REF_ID, FILE_URL, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY REF_ID ORDER BY FILE_ID) AS RN FROM TB_FILE WHERE REF_TYPE = 'PRODUCT' ) f ON f.REF_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID AND f.RN = 1 WHERE
ORDER BY p.PRODUCT_ID DESC ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(p.SALE_PRICE) ASC ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(p.SALE_PRICE) DESC ORDER BY p.PRODUCT_ID ASC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_PRODUCT p WHERE
SELECT p.BRAND_NAME AS BRAND_NAME, COUNT(*) AS PRODUCT_COUNT FROM TB_PRODUCT p WHERE AND p.BRAND_NAME IS NOT NULL GROUP BY p.BRAND_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
SELECT CATEGORY_ID, PARENT_ID, CATEGORY_NAME, DEPTH FROM TB_PRODUCT_CATEGORY WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY CATEGORY_ID

SELECT p.PRODUCT_ID, p.PRODUCT_CD, p.PRODUCT_NAME, p.BRAND_NAME, p.CATEGORY_ID, c.CATEGORY_NAME, TO_NUMBER(p.PRICE) AS PRICE, TO_NUMBER(p.SALE_PRICE) AS SALE_PRICE, NVL(os.STOCK_QTY, 0) AS STOCK_QTY, f.FILE_URL AS THUMBNAIL_URL, p.DESCRIPTION AS DESCRIPTION, NVL(rv.AVG_RATING, 0) AS AVG_RATING, NVL(rv.REVIEW_COUNT, 0) AS REVIEW_COUNT FROM TB_PRODUCT p JOIN TB_PRODUCT_CATEGORY c ON c.CATEGORY_ID = p.CATEGORY_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PRODUCT_ID, SUM(STOCK_QTY) AS STOCK_QTY FROM TB_PRODUCT_OPTION GROUP BY PRODUCT_ID ) os ON os.PRODUCT_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TARGET_ID, ROUND(AVG(RATING), 1) AS AVG_RATING, COUNT(REVIEW_ID) AS REVIEW_COUNT FROM TB_REVIEW WHERE REVIEW_TYPE = 'PRODUCT' GROUP BY TARGET_ID ) rv ON rv.TARGET_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT REF_ID, FILE_URL, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY REF_ID ORDER BY FILE_ID) AS RN FROM TB_FILE WHERE REF_TYPE = 'PRODUCT' ) f ON f.REF_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID AND f.RN = 1 WHERE p.PRODUCT_ID = #{productId}
SELECT FILE_URL FROM TB_FILE WHERE REF_TYPE = 'PRODUCT' AND REF_ID = #{productId} ORDER BY FILE_ID
SELECT OPTION_ID, PRODUCT_ID, OPTION_COLOR, OPTION_SIZE, ADD_PRICE, STOCK_QTY FROM TB_PRODUCT_OPTION WHERE PRODUCT_ID = #{productId} ORDER BY OPTION_ID

SELECT r.REVIEW_ID, r.MEMBER_NO, m.NICKNAME, r.RATING, r.CONTENT, r.REG_DATE, r.BIZ_REPLY, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_REVIEW_REPORT rr WHERE rr.REVIEW_ID = r.REVIEW_ID AND rr.REPORTER_TYPE = 'BIZ' AND rr.STATUS_CD = 'PENDING' ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS BLINDED FROM TB_REVIEW r JOIN TB_MEMBER m ON m.MEMBER_NO = r.MEMBER_NO WHERE r.REVIEW_TYPE = 'PRODUCT' AND r.TARGET_ID = #{productId} ORDER BY r.REG_DATE DESC
SELECT q.QNA_ID, q.MEMBER_NO, m.NICKNAME, q.QUESTION, q.ANSWER, q.REG_DATE FROM TB_PRODUCT_QNA q JOIN TB_MEMBER m ON m.MEMBER_NO = q.MEMBER_NO WHERE q.PRODUCT_ID = #{productId} ORDER BY q.QNA_ID DESC

SELECT ci.CART_ITEM_ID, ci.CART_ID, ci.PRODUCT_ID, ci.OPTION_ID, p.PRODUCT_NAME, p.BRAND_NAME, f.FILE_URL AS THUMBNAIL_URL, o.OPTION_COLOR, o.OPTION_SIZE, TO_NUMBER(ci.QTY) AS QTY, TO_NUMBER(ci.PRICE) AS PRICE, o.STOCK_QTY FROM TB_CART_ITEM ci JOIN TB_CART c ON c.CART_ID = ci.CART_ID JOIN TB_PRODUCT p ON p.PRODUCT_ID = ci.PRODUCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_PRODUCT_OPTION o ON o.OPTION_ID = ci.OPTION_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT REF_ID, FILE_URL, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY REF_ID ORDER BY FILE_ID) AS RN FROM TB_FILE WHERE REF_TYPE = 'PRODUCT' ) f ON f.REF_ID = ci.PRODUCT_ID AND f.RN = 1 WHERE c.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} ORDER BY ci.CART_ITEM_ID

SELECT p.PRODUCT_ID, #{optionId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AS OPTION_ID, p.PRODUCT_NAME, p.BRAND_NAME, p.BIZ_NO, f.FILE_URL AS THUMBNAIL_URL, o.OPTION_COLOR, o.OPTION_SIZE, TO_NUMBER(p.SALE_PRICE) + NVL(o.ADD_PRICE, 0) AS PRICE, NVL(o.STOCK_QTY, (SELECT NVL(SUM(STOCK_QTY),0) FROM TB_PRODUCT_OPTION WHERE PRODUCT_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID)) AS STOCK_QTY FROM TB_PRODUCT p
LEFT JOIN TB_PRODUCT_OPTION o ON o.PRODUCT_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID AND o.OPTION_ID = #{optionId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} LEFT JOIN ( SELECT REF_ID, FILE_URL, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY REF_ID ORDER BY FILE_ID ) AS RN FROM TB_FILE WHERE REF_TYPE = 'PRODUCT' ) f ON f.REF_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID AND f.RN = 1 WHERE p.PRODUCT_ID = #{productId}
SELECT CART_ID FROM TB_CART WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_CART (CART_ID, MEMBER_NO, REG_DATE) VALUES ((SELECT NVL(MAX(CART_ID), 0) + 1 FROM TB_CART), #{memberNo}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))

INSERT INTO TB_CART_ITEM (CART_ITEM_ID, CART_ID, PRODUCT_ID, OPTION_ID, QTY, PRICE) VALUES ((SELECT NVL(MAX(CART_ITEM_ID), 0) + 1 FROM TB_CART_ITEM), #{cartId}, #{productId}, #{optionId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{qty}, #{price})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_CART_ITEM ci JOIN TB_CART c ON c.CART_ID = ci.CART_ID WHERE c.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}

SELECT mc.MEMBER_COUPON_ID, c.COUPON_ID, c.COUPON_NAME, c.COUPON_TYPE, TO_NUMBER(c.DISCOUNT_VALUE) AS DISCOUNT_VALUE, TO_NUMBER(c.MIN_ORDER_AMT) AS MIN_ORDER_AMT FROM TB_MEMBER_COUPON mc JOIN TB_COUPON c ON c.COUPON_ID = mc.COUPON_ID WHERE mc.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND mc.STATUS_CD = 'UNUSED' ORDER BY mc.MEMBER_COUPON_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_PRODUCT_QNA (QNA_ID, PRODUCT_ID, MEMBER_NO, QUESTION, REG_DATE) VALUES ((SELECT NVL(MAX(QNA_ID), 0) + 1 FROM TB_PRODUCT_QNA), #{productId}, #{memberNo}, #{question}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TB_PRODUCT_QNA WHERE QNA_ID = #{qnaId} AND MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND ANSWER IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(QNA_ID) FROM TB_PRODUCT_QNA WHERE PRODUCT_ID = #{productId} AND MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}
SELECT ORDER_ID FROM TB_ORDER WHERE ORDER_NO = #{orderNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_PAYMENT ( PAYMENT_ID, ORDER_ID, PAY_TYPE, PAY_METHOD, PAY_AMOUNT, TOSS_PAYMENT_KEY, TOSS_ORDER_ID, PAY_STATUS, PAY_DATE ) VALUES ( (SELECT NVL(MAX(PAYMENT_ID), 0) + 1 FROM TB_PAYMENT), #{orderId}, 'ORDER', #{payMethod}, #{payAmount}, #{tossPaymentKey}, #{tossOrderId}, 'DONE', SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_MEMBER_COUPON SET STATUS_CD = 'USED' WHERE MEMBER_COUPON_ID = #{memberCouponId}
UPDATE TB_MEMBER SET POINT_BALANCE = NVL(POINT_BALANCE, 0) - #{pointUsed} WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_POINT (POINT_ID, MEMBER_NO, POINT_TYPE, POINT_AMOUNT, BALANCE_AFTER, REASON_CD, REF_TYPE, REF_ID, REG_DATE) VALUES ( (SELECT NVL(MAX(POINT_ID), 0) + 1 FROM TB_POINT), #{memberNo}, 'USE', #{pointUsed}, (SELECT POINT_BALANCE FROM TB_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}), 'ORDER_USE', 'ORDER', #{orderId}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_PRODUCT SET STATUS_CD = 'SOLDOUT' WHERE PRODUCT_ID = #{productId} AND STATUS_CD = 'NORMAL' AND (SELECT NVL(SUM(STOCK_QTY),0) FROM TB_PRODUCT_OPTION WHERE PRODUCT_ID = #{productId}) <= 0
mapper.select: SELECT M.MEMBER_NO FROM TB_BUSINESS B JOIN TB_MEMBER M ON M.MEMBER_ID = B.BIZ_ID WHERE B.BIZ_NO = #{bizNo}
